site.title: International Accessibility Task Force
site.tagline: Pole apparelluang aksesibilitas lao ri repo publik
nav.label: Pammulang
meta.home.description: IATF napinrai apparelluanna aksesibilitas sitongeng-tongeng mancaji repositori open source.
meta.projects.description: Browse proyek aksesibilitas umum dipublikasikan melalui IATF.
meta.propose.description: Mellau proyek aksesibilitas pole IATF melalui web, email, iyaregga Discord.
meta.governance.description: Bacai pekkogai IATF natarimai proyek, najagai repositori, na nataro jama jama jama.
meta.join.description: Bentu' untu' maccue ri IATF: mabbage kode, nabettuangi, nacobai, iyarega napertahangkang seddi proyek.
meta.accessibility.description: Aga akkattana IATF untu' nataroi iyyae situs web'e wedding riakses nenniya pekkogai carana nalaporo' halangi aksesibilitas.
meta.transparency.description: Arsip publik IATF: keputusanna, proyekna, nennia update'na dijaga secara default.
actions.emailProjects: Kirim email lao ri inbox proyek-proyekku
registry.empty.title: Depa na publikasikang proyek
proposal.form.title: Kiringngi pappebalinna
proposal.form.body: Pennoi formu ri yawae untu' kiring parellui lao ri IATF.
proposal.form.noscript: JavaScript riapparelluang untu' mappake bentu' web'e. Narekko de'na gaga, pakei email iyarega Discord.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Live submission de'na ri konfigurasi ri lingkungang iyae. Bentuk iyae maelo mabbukka klien email mu.
proposal.form.ready: Akkiringeng aman'e siap. Wettuna mu kiring parellui, IATF maelo makkebbu catatang intake.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Tulukka mappaccappuri attiroang spam riwettu depa na kiring.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Proteksi spam pura cappu. Tulukka tessipu paimeng riwettu depa na kiring.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Proteksi spam de'na ulle ri verifikasi makkokkoe. Coba paimeng.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Akkarenangeng spam purai cappu. Alai cobai paimeng.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Silakan penuhi bidang-bidang iyya parellue riwettu depa na kiring.
proposal.form.success: Sukkuru'ki. Parellui ritarima sibawa ritaro untu' ripannessa.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Narekko iko sisompung paimeng sibawa IATF ritujunna iyyae perellue, pakkegunai pattujung iyya riawa.
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Engka sala wettunna kiring parellui. Coba paimeng. Narekko masala e matteru, pake email e.
project.detail.problemTitle: Aga masala iyae proyek e nasolusi
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Sumber basa Inggris biasa, werekkada wedding ditambai rimunri
footer.label: Riase'na situs'e
footer.blurb: Jamang aksesibilitas waji' lebbi malomo ripammulai, lebbi gampang ripublisingi, nenniya lebbi gampang rijaga tabukka.
footer.source: Referensi standar aksesibilitas: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/)Praktek iya riisseng pole pakkeguna teknologi assistif.
contact.label: Kontakna
translation.label: Status terjemahanna
translation.source: Bahasa Inggris iyanaritu bahasa assaleng kanonik untu' iyyaro halaman e.
translation.humanReviewed: Iyyae werekkadae pura ripakei pole seddi tau mabbicarang malempu.
translation.machineAssisted: Iyyae werekkadae makkebbu akkegunanna mesina nenniyya depa na riita maneng pole ri tau mabberekkada iyya maccae. Akkebettuangnge rialai pole ri GitHub.
translation.needsUpdate: Iyyae werekkadae risellei riwettu de'na ripassu sumber basa Inggris kaminang baru nenniyya nulle parellui ripabettuwaangi.
